name: financial-markets
description: Public equity investing workflows for listed-company research, earnings analysis, valuation, model updates, long/short pitches, catalysts, thesis tracking, ETF/index and constituent diligence, sell-side research notes, risk sizing, hedging, dashboards, and investment memos.

interface.shortDescription: Public equity PM research, long/short, earnings, ETF/index diligence, and memos
interface.longDescription: Public equity investing workflows for long-only investors, long/short hedge funds, sell-side equity research teams, ETF/index and constituent diligence, event-driven equity investors, and sector/thematic listed-equity research teams. Outputs should surface what is mispriced, what is priced in, what proves or kills the thesis, what to do next, and what evidence is missing. Use Credit Markets for credit instruments, creditworthiness, restructuring, distressed, recovery, spreads, yields, covenants, and debt security analysis.
defaultPrompt: Use only for explicit or unmistakable listed-equity investor work; apply shared/invocation-policy.md before routing.
Before source gathering or analysis, apply shared/deliverable-intake-policy.md; use request_user_input when choices remain.
Reuse resolved choices downstream and verify time-sensitive market data before investment use.
